step_rationale: Anchors for lipid peroxidation; Class includes 8-iso-PGF2α and related oxidative products.
mechanism: F2-isoprostanes are non-enzymatic lipid peroxidation products reflecting oxidative stress in atherosclerotic plaque and atherothrombotic progression.

references.title: Isoprostanes: potential markers of oxidant stress in atherothrombotic disease.
